pi_items.source: Task description in task.json and export_result.sh explicitly require these view names.
Task description in task.json and export_result.sh explicitly require this table name.
Task description in task.json and export_result.sh explicitly require this stored procedure name.
Task description in task.json, setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly specify this export path.
Task description in task.json, setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly specify this export path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating specific database objects in the public Sakila MySQL database: views 'v_film_revenue_ranked' and 'v_customer_rfm', table 'rpt_monthly_category_performance', and stored procedure 'sp_refresh_category_performance'. It also requires exporting data to CSV files at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/film_revenue_ranked.csv' and '/home/ga/Documents/exports/monthly_category_performance.csv'.
